pageSnapshots.snippet: document.addEventListener("generateFuncReady", function(){ setTimeout(function() { // https://stackoverflow.com/questions/43717316/google-chrome-document-body-scrolltop-always-returns-0 // 不巧某个基础库有用到，要 fixed 它 Object.defineProperty(document.body, 'scrollTop', { get() { return document.documentElement.scrollTop }, set(value) { document.documentElement.scrollTop = value }, configurable: true, }) }, 100) }) if (document.readyState === 'complete') { window.__global.alert("DOCUMENT_READY") } else { const fn = () => { window.__global.alert("DOCUMENT_READY") window.removeEventListener('load', fn) } window.addEventListener('load', fn) }
